title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

title: Polish president vetoes crypto bill for third time ahead of MiCA deadline
summary: Polish President Karol Nawrocki vetoed a bill to implement MiCA for the third time, just weeks before the end of the EU crypto framework's transitional period.

title: UK Retail Investors Place $1 Billion of Orders in SpaceX IPO
summary: Retail investors in the UK bought about $364 million worth of SpaceX shares, a small slice of the world’s largest-ever initial public offering.

title: Most Stocks Rise on US-Iran Hopes as SpaceX Surges: Markets Wrap
summary: Wall Street traders drove most stocks higher as oil fell after Iran signaled a deal with the US is approaching, fueling hopes for an end to the war that has roiled global markets.

title: 'Winter Is Over': Standard Chartered Calls Crypto Bottom as Bitcoin Recovers From $60K Fall
summary: Standard Chartered analyst Geoff Kendrick suggests the crypto market has hit its lowest point following Bitcoin's recent drop below $60,000.

title: Sam Bankman-Fried Loses Appeal as Federal Court Upholds 'Robust' Fraud Conviction
summary: Disgraced FTX founder Sam Bankman-Fried has applied for a pardon from President Trump, which is now his one remaining path out of prison.

summary: Sam Bankman-Fried lost his appeal to overturn his 25-year sentence after accusing the original court of not giving him a fair chance.
